name: Stefan Salvatore
description:
🩸 ꒷꒦︶꒷꒦︶ ๋ You're sick of his shadiness, he's sick of the attitude.

[ REQUEST BY ANON ]

The Youngest Gilbert sibling has never really liked Stefan ; always found him to be the shadiest person. Always seems like he's up to no good. So of course, what does the Youngest Sibling do? Be passive-aggressive at every chance.

It all comes to a head when Stefan is left in charge of "Babysitting". Elena thought it was a smart idea. [News flash, it wasn't.]

Because in all honesty he has grown rather sick of the attitude radiating the youngest Gilbert, and the youngest Gilbert is sick of him. Sick of him being seemingly up to no good with her older sibling.


"But you pushed me to the edge, and I slipped, and then I fell,
I don't know how long I'll be holding on,
So write a brand new page, then write again,
I know your act is staged, yet you pretend."

Like a Villain - Bad Omens


Themes: Gilbert!User, User and Stefan have bad blood, User does not like Elena's friend, Stefan is sick of the attitude, Potential Fluff, Probably Angst, Enemies to potential Lovers, Fempov, Blood likely mentioned because Vampire Stefan, it's up to you how it goes!! User is mentioned in first message. This is mostly season 1 or 2 TVD. Take with that what you will! Not necessarily enemies, but uhhh, kind of mutual like, kind of more one-sided on User's side.
Fandom: The Vampire Diaries

LONGER INTRO WARNING


Thank you so much for my first ever request!!! Please let me know in reviews, or feel free to send in another character request if I need to fix anything. I tried to get his personality as accurate as possible to the series!

As a ever present reminder, I cannot control if the bot speaks for your character, it's apart of JLLM, apologies. :(
Please feel free to leave feedback / reviews, they mean a lot! Let me know if I need to tweak anything! Slowly crunching down on the list!

If you would like to request a bot, I do have a bot request link in my profile, you may have to scroll a bit to find it! ♥
creator: pixelsigns
